description: Returns the name of the topmost commanding menu or "" if the menu is closed. For action menu visibility check see [[isActionMenuVisible]]. See {{Link|#Notes}} for {{arma2}}/{{arma3}} structure.
examples:
<sqf>
waitUntil { sleep 0.1; commandingMenu == "RscStatus" };
hint "Press 4, I'm bleeding !";
</sqf>
name: commandingMenu
